_meta.name: NIFTY-50 (May 2026)
_meta.description: Top 50 stocks by market cap (NIFTY-50 index composition). Used for fast pre-live battery validation: 50 stocks x 60 days runs in ~15-20 min on workers=2, whereas the full 232-stock v2 universe takes 12+ hours per variant.
_meta.note: These are the first 50 symbols of tests/fixtures/battery_v2_universe.json by market-cap order. Refresh quarterly if NIFTY-50 composition changes.
